title: Seamless Sleep
description:
Adds a smooth, cinematic transition between night and day when players sleep, enhancing the sleeping camera, HUD, and overall visuals.
MADE IN HEAVEN!!!
body:
# In constant development! OMG 200K DOWNLOADS!!!!!
## Still working on 3.0!! Soon to be real :)
**A mod made with love for you guys <3**

In a 3-step nutshell:
- *A player sleeps*
- **MADE IN HEAVEN!!!**
- *honk mimimi* *hooonk mimimimi*

Seamless Sleep is a **server-client** mod that turns going to bed into a smooth, in-world transition instead of a hard cut to daytime. A lot of mods do something similar, but this mod **takes a different approach** to that.

The whole night-skipping sequence is animated locally on the client, so it doesn’t depend on the server or a perfect connection. The transition stays consistent and fluid for the player even with higher latency.

## Video about it
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/xkUT51TaCII" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

---

## Update Roadmap to 3.0.0!
(First release will be 1.21.11 and then others)

![Image here shows a canvas talking about the new update.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf7c514a10b6099e8caa098e27199201f8e42510_0.webp)

---

## Version Control
This is a version control for Seamless Sleep as of 04/04/2026
![This is a version control for Seamless Sleep as of 04/04/2026](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c86ae6894f0371a1b69fd276a087955fee8016de.png)

Feel free to add me on Discord (gabrielfl4) or post an issue on GitHub to share your feedback on improvements :)


## Features

- **Smooth night → day transition**  
  Replaces the abrupt time jump with a clean, blended animation when players sleep.

- **Shared sleep animation**  
  The transition is synchronized visually so all players see the same progression as the night is skipped.

- **Sleep HUD polish**  
  - Brightens and cleans up the default sleep HUD.  
  - Slightly tilts the camera while you’re in bed for a more relaxed feeling.

- **Configurable chat while sleeping**  
  Adjust the opacity of both chat text and background specifically during sleep.  
  Useful for servers where players still talk while skipping the night.

- **Cleaned-up messages**  
  Hides the vanilla “passing the night” text and replaces it with a more subtle indicator.

## Multiplayer timing & clock sync

If you notice that **your sleep animation on a server is happening much later than other players**, it’s usually a local clock issue on your machine.

To fix it:
(I'll be working on it to improve this)

- Open the **Date & Time** settings in Windows.  
- Enable automatic time synchronization or manually **sync the system clock** with an internet time server.  
- Done!

Once your system time is corrected, your sleep animation should line up much more closely with everyone else’s.

## Configuration

Seamless Sleep integrates with:

- **Mod Menu** – quick access to settings from the mods list.

All options are saved in `seamless_sleep-*.toml`, so advanced users can tweak things directly if they want.

## License & usage

This project is currently marked as **All Rights Reserved** on Modrinth.  
Even so, you are **explicitly allowed** to:

- Use Seamless Sleep in **any modpack**, public or private.  
- Run it on **any server or singleplayer world**.

Please avoid reuploading the mod jar as your own or distributing modified copies separately – instead, link back to this Modrinth page.

## Feedback & future plans

🐛 Found a bug or have a suggestion? Please open an issue or discussion on the Git repository linked on this page – feedback is very welcome.

The current focus is to bring Seamless Sleep to most versions on range of (1.20 - 1.21.11) in Fabric, Forge (when available) and Neoforge.

---

Lie down, let the night fade out smoothly, and wake up to a cleaner, less jarring morning transition.
